name: Puttanesca
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet.
2. Saute garlic, celery, and sweet red pepper until soft.
3. Press tomatoes through a food mill and add to the skillet along with anchovies.
4. Simmer for 10 minutes.
5. Stir in olives, capers, basil, and dried red pepper.
6. Simmer, uncovered, for an additional 20 minutes.
7. Serve with hot pasta tossed with butter.
